name: Advance America
description_short: Cincinnati's Advance America on Springfield Pike offers quick payday and title loans with extended Friday hours.
description_long:
Advance America's Cincinnati location stands at 10589 Springfield Pike, offering walk-in access to payday and title loans in the Springfield Pike area. The storefront operates Monday through Thursday from 10AM to 6PM, Friday 9AM to 6PM, making it convenient for Cincinnati residents with traditional weekday schedules. As a standalone location, this Cincinnati branch provides dedicated space for loan applications.

The Springfield Pike Advance America in Cincinnati specializes in short-term lending solutions, including payday loans for immediate cash needs and title loans for vehicle owners. Contact the Cincinnati location directly at +1 513-771-1114 to discuss eligibility, required documentation, and loan terms. Application processing at this Advance America branch is designed to be quick, with decisions often made the same day.

If you're a Cincinnati resident in need of emergency cash, this Advance America location is accessible during standard business hours—closed Saturdays and Sundays. Bring valid government ID, proof of income, and banking information to speed up the application process. This Springfield Pike storefront serves OH residents seeking short-term lending solutions.
pros: Same-day funding available in-store on approved loans
Three distinct loan products covering $100 to $25,000 in a single location
Online and in-store application options plus phone pre-qualification
Title loans up to $25,000 available via LoanCenter partnership
Western Union money transfers available at same location
cons: Payday loans capped at $500 — insufficient for most financial emergencies above minor shortfalls
High-cost lending: payday loans in this category typically carry triple-digit APRs not disclosed on the storefront page
Title loans require a fully paid-off vehicle with title in borrower's name — excludes most borrowers
Checking account required, excluding unbanked applicants
Closed Sundays, with limited Saturday hours (closes 4 pm)
best_for: Borrowers needing $100–$500 quickly before their next paycheck with no access to cheaper credit
People with poor or thin credit who are ineligible for personal loans from banks or credit unions
Car owners with a paid-off vehicle who need $2,000–$25,000 and can tolerate collateral risk
Spanish-speaking customers who prefer or require bilingual in-person loan assistance
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for borrowers who need fast cash under $1,000 and have exhausted lower-cost options such as credit union PALs, employer advances, or personal loans. The main caveat is that payday loans in particular carry extremely high annualized costs, making them financially damaging if rolled over or not repaid within the stated two-to-four-week window.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 10589 Springfield Pike, Cincinnati, OH. Quick payday and title loans, open Fridays until 6PM.
